channel.title: Nerra Network
channel.description: Ten podcasts in two languages keeping you informed about exciting changes in the world. Unbiased, multi-perspective coverage of Tesla, world news, space, science, AI, the environment, modern investing, financial literacy, and Russian language learning.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 420 - March 31, 2026
item.description:
**Tesla Shorts Time – Special Educational Episode**
Hey, it’s March 31st, 2026. Normally we’d be diving into the week’s biggest Tesla stories, but the news cycle was unusually quiet, so I thought we’d do something different today. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.itunes:title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 420 - March 31, 2026

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time - Episode 421 - March 31, 2026
item.description:
**Tesla Shorts Time – Special Educational Episode**
Hey, it’s me.
March 31, 2026, and honestly the news cycle this week was pretty thin, so I figured we’d do something different. Instead of rushing through a bunch of small updates, let’s sit with one topic that keeps coming up in our conversations and that actually matters a lot if you’re trying to understand where Tesla is headed. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 26: Oil prices fell after reports President Trump is willing to end the Iran conflict even if the Strait of Hormuz stays largely closed.
item.description:
**# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing** **Date:** March 31, 2026
**HOOK:** Oil prices fell after reports President Trump is willing to end the Iran conflict even if the Strait of Hormuz stays largely closed.
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Oil prices fall on Trump willingness to end Iran hostilities **What happened (neutral):** Oil prices reversed course and declined as traders reacted to reports that President Donald Trump expressed willingness to conclude military action against Iran despite the Stra...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

**# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing** **Date:** March 31, 2026

item.title: Ep 23: Alibaba Qwen just dropped Qwen3.5-Omni, a native end-to-end multimodal model built for text, audio, video, and realtime interaction.
item.description:
**Models & Agents** **Date:** March 31, 2026
**HOOK:** Alibaba Qwen just dropped Qwen3.5-Omni, a native end-to-end multimodal model built for text, audio, video, and realtime interaction.
**What You Need to Know:** The biggest news today is the shift from patchwork multimodal wrappers to truly native omnimodal architectures, with Qwen3.5-Omni positioned as a direct challenger to Gemini 1.5 Pro and similar flagships. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Models & Agents** **Date:** March 31, 2026
**HOOK:** Alibaba Qwen just dropped Qwen3.5-Omni, a native end-to-end multimodal model built for text, audio, video, and realtime interaction.
**What You Need to Know:** The biggest news today is the shift from patchwork multimodal wrappers to truly native omnimodal architectures, with Qwen3.5-Omni positioned as a direct challenger to Gemini 1.5 Pro and similar flagships. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 23: Alibaba Qwen just dropped Qwen3.5-Omni, a native end-to-end multimodal model built for text, audio, video, and realtime interaction.

item.title: Ep 9: Geopolitical energy shock sends S&P 500 toward its worst quarter since 2022 while pushing Eurozone inflation to 2.5%.
item.description:
**# Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** March 31, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence
**HOOK:** Geopolitical energy shock sends S&P 500 toward its worst quarter since 2022 while pushing Eurozone inflation to 2.5%.
**Market Pulse:** Markets are under pressure with the S&P 500 at 6,344 (-0.4%), NASDAQ Composite at 20,795 (-0.7%), and TSX Composite at 31,935 (-0.1%). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 47: SpaceX is preparing to loft 119 small satellites in one rideshare launch from California this morning.
item.description:
# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** March 30, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News
**HOOK:** SpaceX is preparing to loft 119 small satellites in one rideshare launch from California this morning.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **SpaceX Transporter-16 Readies 119 Payloads: DD March 2026 • Spaceflight Now** SpaceX will launch the 21st mission in its smallsat rideshare program aboard a Falcon 9 from Vandenberg Space Force Base at 4:02 a.m. PDT. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** March 30, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News
**HOOK:** SpaceX is preparing to loft 119 small satellites in one rideshare launch from California this morning.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **SpaceX Transporter-16 Readies 119 Payloads: DD March 2026 • Spaceflight Now** SpaceX will launch the 21st mission in its smallsat rideshare program aboard a Falcon 9 from Vandenberg Space Force Base at 4:02 a.m. PDT. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 47: SpaceX is preparing to loft 119 small satellites in one rideshare launch from California this morning.

item.title: Ep 17: Alberta Bill 23 would eliminate government deadlines to respond to citizen petitions under the Citizen Initiative Act.
item.description:
**Date:** March 30, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — Canadian Environmental Professional Briefing
**HOOK:** Alberta Bill 23 would eliminate government deadlines to respond to citizen petitions under the Citizen Initiative Act.
**Executive Summary:** Alberta’s proposed Bill 23 would substantively amend the Citizen Initiative Act for the third time since 2021, removing mandatory timelines for government action on citizen petitions and recall applications. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Date:** March 30, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — Canadian Environmental Professional Briefing
**HOOK:** Alberta Bill 23 would eliminate government deadlines to respond to citizen petitions under the Citizen Initiative Act.
**Executive Summary:** Alberta’s proposed Bill 23 would substantively amend the Citizen Initiative Act for the third time since 2021, removing mandatory timelines for government action on citizen petitions and recall applications. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 17: Alberta Bill 23 would eliminate government deadlines to respond to citizen petitions under the Citizen Initiative Act.

item.title: Ep 13: Bluesky just dropped an AI that builds your perfect social feed from a simple sentence — no coding needed.
item.description:
**Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** March 30, 2026
**HOOK:** Bluesky just dropped an AI that builds your perfect social feed from a simple sentence — no coding needed.
**What's Cool Today:** Today we’re seeing AI move from just chatting to actually building things for you, like custom social media feeds that match exactly what you want to see. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 16 - March 30, 2026
item.description:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 30, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Ontario расширяет налоговую скидку на новые дома — что это значит для рынка недвижимости
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня поговорим о важном изменении в Онтарио, которое касается покупки нового жилья и возврата налогов. Хотя это происходит не в Британской Колумбии, такие новости помогают лучше понимать, как работают налоговые льготы при покупке дома в Канаде. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 30, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Ontario расширяет налоговую скидку на новые дома — что это значит для рынка недвижимости
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня поговорим о важном изменении в Онтарио, которое касается покупки нового жилья и возврата налогов. Хотя это происходит не в Британской Колумбии, такие новости помогают лучше понимать, как работают налоговые льготы при покупке дома в Канаде. ...

item.itunes:title: Финансы Просто - Episode 16 - March 30, 2026

Welcome to this special educational edition of Omni View. When regular news flow is light, we step back and examine a structural issue that will shape economies, privacy, and geopolitics for decades. ...

item.title: Ep 22: Naver's Seoul World Model grounds video generation in real Street View geometry from over a million images and generalizes to other cities without fine-tuning.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Naver's Seoul World Model grounds video generation in real Street View geometry from over a million images and generalizes to other cities without fine-tuning.
**What You Need to Know:** Naver has released a video world model trained on actual city geometry instead of pure synthetic data, directly addressing one of the biggest failure modes in current world models: hallucinating plausible but incorrect urban layouts. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**HOOK:** Naver's Seoul World Model grounds video generation in real Street View geometry from over a million images and generalizes to other cities without fine-tuning.
**What You Need to Know:** Naver has released a video world model trained on actual city geometry instead of pure synthetic data, directly addressing one of the biggest failure modes in current world models: hallucinating plausible but incorrect urban layouts. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 22: Naver's Seoul World Model grounds video generation in real Street View geometry from over a million images and generalizes to other cities without fine-tuning.

item.title: Ep 46: [Slow News Edition] Mars-like exoplanets orbiting M-dwarfs could lose their atmospheres in just millions of years.
item.description:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **Mars-like Worlds Near M-Dwarfs May Lose Air** • 28 March 2026 • Universe Today New modelling shows how a Mars-like exoplanet orbiting Barnard's star would lose its atmosphere through atmospheric escape processes. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 12: Meta built an AI that can predict how your brain will react to pictures, music, and speech — better than reading one real person's brain scan.
item.description:
**Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** March 28, 2026
**HOOK:** Meta built an AI that can predict how your brain will react to pictures, music, and speech — better than reading one real person's brain scan.
**What's Cool Today:** Meta just created a model that predicts brain activity when you see images, hear sounds, or listen to speech. It actually matches typical human brain responses more closely than any single real person's scan would. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Models & Agents for Beginners** **Date:** March 28, 2026
**HOOK:** Meta built an AI that can predict how your brain will react to pictures, music, and speech — better than reading one real person's brain scan.

item.itunes:title: Ep 12: Meta built an AI that can predict how your brain will react to pictures, music, and speech — better than reading one real person's brain scan.

item.title: Ep 15: [Slow News Edition]
item.description:
**Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 28, 2026
**Заголовок:** Ontario расширяет возврат HST на новые дома — что это значит для покупательниц в BC
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня мы поговорим о важном изменении в правилах возврата налога на новые дома в Онтарио и о том, как это может косвенно повлиять на рынок недвижимости по всей Канаде. Хотя новость из Онтарио, она важна для тех, кто следит за ценами на жильё и ипотечными ставками. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

**Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 28, 2026
**Заголовок:** Ontario расширяет возврат HST на новые дома — что это значит для покупательниц в BC
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня мы поговорим о важном изменении в правилах возврата налога на новые дома в Онтарио и о том, как это может косвенно повлиять на рынок недвижимости по всей Канаде. Хотя новость из Онтарио, она важна для тех, кто следит за ценами на жильё и ипотечными ставками. ...

item.title: Привет, Русский! - Episode 7 - March 28, 2026
item.description:
**Привет, Русский! — Episode Plan** **Date:** March 28, 2026 **Theme:** Weather (Погода)
**Vocabulary List (10 words/phrases):**
- Russian (Cyrillic): погода Transliteration: pa-GO-da English: weather Example sentence: Какая сегодня погода? Example translation: What is the weather like today? Memory hook: Sounds like “page” + “oda” — imagine turning the page of a weather calendar every day.
- Russian (Cyrillic): дождь Transliteration: dozh-d’ (soft “d” at the end) ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Привет, Русский! — Episode Plan** **Date:** March 28, 2026 **Theme:** Weather (Погода)
**Vocabulary List (10 words/phrases):**
- Russian (Cyrillic): погода Transliteration: pa-GO-da English: weather Example sentence: Какая сегодня погода? Example translation: What is the weather like today? Memory hook: Sounds like “page” + “oda” — imagine turning the page of a weather calendar every day.
- Russian (Cyrillic): дождь Transliteration: dozh-d’ (soft “d” at the end) ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 21: New arXiv papers expose critical flaws in how we evaluate depression-detection models, LLM pruning, and verbalized confidence.
item.description:
**Models & Agents** **Date:** March 27, 2026
**HOOK:** New arXiv papers expose critical flaws in how we evaluate depression-detection models, LLM pruning, and verbalized confidence.
**What You Need to Know:** Today's cs.CL batch reveals that many impressive medical AI results may be artifacts of interviewer prompts rather than genuine participant signals, while pruning works for classification but breaks generation due to probability-space amplification. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Models & Agents** **Date:** March 27, 2026
**HOOK:** New arXiv papers expose critical flaws in how we evaluate depression-detection models, LLM pruning, and verbalized confidence.
**What You Need to Know:** Today's cs.CL batch reveals that many impressive medical AI results may be artifacts of interviewer prompts rather than genuine participant signals, while pruning works for classification but breaks generation due to probability-space amplification. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 21: New arXiv papers expose critical flaws in how we evaluate depression-detection models, LLM pruning, and verbalized confidence.

item.title: Ep 11: Anthropic just confirmed their leaked model is a huge leap in AI reasoning — and it happened because of a simple security slip-up.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Anthropic just confirmed their leaked model is a huge leap in AI reasoning — and it happened because of a simple security slip-up.
**What's Cool Today:** Anthropic accidentally revealed their most advanced AI yet through a data breach, calling it a "step change" in how well models can reason and solve problems. This shows how fast the biggest AI companies are racing to build smarter systems, even as they compete with Google and OpenAI. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 14 - March 26, 2026
item.description:
**Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 26, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Как управлять семейным бюджетом в условиях высокой стоимости жизни в Ванкувере и Нижнем Материке.
Разбираем бюджетирование для иммигранток в Британской Колумбии: как вести учёт расходов, проверить пособия через CRA, и оптимизировать банковские счета. Практические советы для жизни в Ванкувере и Нижнем Материке.
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 26, 2026

Разбираем бюджетирование для иммигранток в Британской Колумбии: как вести учёт расходов, проверить пособия через CRA, и оптимизировать банковские счета. Практические советы для жизни в Ванкувере и Нижнем Материке.

item.title: Ep 14: Ontario's absence from federal Ring of Fire impact assessment creates immediate regulatory uncertainty for mining proponents in northern Ontario.
item.description:
**HOOK:** Ontario's absence from federal Ring of Fire impact assessment creates immediate regulatory uncertainty for mining proponents in northern Ontario.
**Executive Summary:** Ontario did not participate in the federal Impact Assessment Agency of Canada and First Nations-led interim report on Ring of Fire development impacts, raising questions about provincial-federal coordination under the Impact Assessment Act. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Финансы Просто - Episode 13 - March 24, 2026
item.description:
**# Финансы Просто** **Дата:** March 24, 2026
**ЗАГОЛОВОК:** Как найти ипотеку, когда банки говорят «нет»: история одной семьи из Эдмонтона
**Что сегодня важного:** Сегодня мы поговорим о том, что делать, если традиционные банки отказывают в ипотеке, но вы всё равно хотите купить дом. Также разберём, где сейчас можно получить более высокие проценты на свои сбережения. А в блоке «Объясни как подруге» я подробно расскажу, как на самом деле работает альтернативное ипотечное кредитование. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 3: Estée Lauder confirms a potential merger suitor yet its stock still struggles — a textbook lesson in market skepticism versus headline optimism.
item.description:
**# Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** March 24, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence
**HOOK:** Estée Lauder confirms a potential merger suitor yet its stock still struggles — a textbook lesson in market skepticism versus headline optimism.
**Market Pulse:** North American markets opened solidly higher today with the S&P 500 at 6,581 (+1.1%), NASDAQ Composite at 21,947 (+1.4%), and TSX Composite at 31,884 (+1.8%). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 19: TrustFlow introduces topic-aware vector reputation for multi-agent systems, replacing scalar scores with queryable multi-dimensional vectors.
item.description:
**HOOK:** TrustFlow introduces topic-aware vector reputation for multi-agent systems, replacing scalar scores with queryable multi-dimensional vectors.
**What You Need to Know:** Today’s arXiv drop is dominated by multi-agent research, with new frameworks for reputation propagation, co-evolutionary prompt optimization, group-based communication topologies, and long-horizon agent training. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**HOOK:** TrustFlow introduces topic-aware vector reputation for multi-agent systems, replacing scalar scores with queryable multi-dimensional vectors.
**What You Need to Know:** Today’s arXiv drop is dominated by multi-agent research, with new frameworks for reputation propagation, co-evolutionary prompt optimization, group-based communication topologies, and long-horizon agent training. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 19: TrustFlow introduces topic-aware vector reputation for multi-agent systems, replacing scalar scores with queryable multi-dimensional vectors.

item.title: Ep 20: Fair zero-determinant strategies break in the periodic prisoner's dilemma, unlike the classic repeated version.
item.description:
**Models & Agents** **Date:** March 23, 2026
**HOOK:** Fair zero-determinant strategies break in the periodic prisoner's dilemma, unlike the classic repeated version.
**What You Need to Know:** Today's arXiv drop reveals that core assumptions from repeated games don't cleanly transfer to stochastic environments, with fair ZD strategies and even Tit-for-Tat losing their guarantees in the periodic prisoner's dilemma. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:

**What You Need to Know:** Today's arXiv drop reveals that core assumptions from repeated games don't cleanly transfer to stochastic environments, with fair ZD strategies and even Tit-for-Tat losing their guarantees in the periodic prisoner's dilemma. ...
